creator: ems@open-root.org
text:
When trying to use netstat -ia, a bus error occurs:

[teqnix](~)%netstat -ia
Name  Mtu   Network       Address            Ipkts Ierrs    Opkts Oerrs  Coll
dc0   1500  <Link#1>    00:a0:cc:63:e1:8f    32043     0    33917     0     0
zsh: bus error  netstat -ia

How-To-Repeat: netstat -ia
